race.comment: TRANGOOJAHRAY (3) pushed forward from a wide draw when fresh from a spell last time out and was prominent for a long way before fading to finish fourth over 1500m at Sandown-Lakeside. She's a sparingly raced mare who should strip fitter and take beating. QUEENSBURY (4) is a genuine type with three minor placings from four starts this time in work. Knocking on the door and can break through. RED ON RED (1) finished third last start over 1600m at Sandown-Lakeside, beaten 2.75 lengths. Back a notch here and he loves racing here on his home deck. Big chance. INFINITE JEST (5) faded late last time over 1746m at Sale after showing good early speed, eventually finishing fourth. He's another who races well here at home and has winning claims.
